vars.preheader: Use this code to finish signing in.
vars.title: Confirm your sign-in
vars.intro: We received a request to sign in to your Arquantix account. Enter this code in the open browser tab to continue.

warning.title: Didn’t request this?
warning.body: If this wasn’t you, ignore this email and consider rotating your password — your account remains secure as long as no one enters this code.

legal.body: Arquantix never asks for this code by phone or chat. We will not contact you about it. If anyone asks for it, do not share it.
